title: All Protection Enchantments are Compatible
description: makes protection, fire protection, blast protection and projectile protection all compatible with each other!
body: This datapack modifies Minecraft’s enchantment system so that Protection, Fire Protection, Blast Protection, and Projectile Protection are no longer mutually exclusive. Players can now combine these defensive enchantments freely on a single piece of armor using an anvil or enchantment table. This means you can create powerful hybrid armor that defends against all types of damage, from explosions and fire to arrows and general attacks—without being limited by vanilla’s incompatibility rules. Perfect for players who want complete protection or enjoy highly customized gear builds.
